mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gb_workflow_execution (execution_id, workflow_code, mode, status, input_data, output_data, error, start_time, end_time, duration, site_id, create_by, create_time) VALUES (#{executionId}, #{workflowCode}, #{mode}, #{status}, #{inputData}, #{outputData}, #{error}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{duration}, #{siteId}, #{createBy}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT e.*, w.workflow_name FROM gb_workflow_execution e LEFT JOIN gb_workflow w ON w.workflow_code = e.workflow_code WHERE e.execution_id = #{executionId} LIMIT 1

SELECT workflow_code AS workflowCode, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS successCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'running' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS runningCount, AVG(CASE WHEN status = 'success' AND duration IS NOT NULL THEN duration END) AS avgDuration, MAX(create_time) AS lastRunTime FROM gb_workflow_execution WHERE workflow_code = #{workflowCode}
